authors_text: Lei Liu,Shunqi Huang,Brian M. Kurkoski
title: Memory Approximate Message Passing
title_zh: 内存近似消息传递
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, accepted by IEEE ISIT 2021. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2012.10861
comments: 6 pages, 5 figures, accepted by IEEE ISIT 2021. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2012.10861
abstract: Approximate message passing (AMP) is a low-cost iterative parameter-estimation technique for certain high-dimensional linear systems with non-Gaussian distributions. However, AMP only applies to independent identically distributed (IID) transform matrices, but may become unreliable for other matrix ensembles, especially for ill-conditioned ones. To handle this difficulty, orthogonal/vector AMP (OAMP/VAMP) was proposed for general right-unitarily-invariant matrices. However, the Bayes-optimal OAMP/VAMP requires high-complexity linear minimum mean square error estimator. To solve the disadvantages of AMP and OAMP/VAMP, this paper proposes a memory AMP (MAMP), in which a long-memory matched filter is proposed for interference suppression. The complexity of MAMP is comparable to AMP. The asymptotic Gaussianity of estimation errors in MAMP is guaranteed by the orthogonality principle. A state evolution is derived to asymptotically characterize the performance of MAMP. Based on the state evolution, the relaxation parameters and damping vector in MAMP are optimized. For all right-unitarily-invariant matrices, the optimized MAMP converges to OAMP/VAMP, and thus is Bayes-optimal if it has a unique fixed point. Finally, simulations are provided to verify the validity and accuracy of the theoretical results.
summary: Approximate message passing (AMP) is a low-cost iterative parameter-estimation technique for certain high-dimensional linear systems with non-Gaussian distributions. However, AMP only applies to independent identically distributed (IID) transform matrices, but may become unreliable for other matrix ensembles, especially for ill-conditioned ones. To handle this difficulty, orthogonal/vector AMP (OAMP/VAMP) was proposed for general right-unitarily-invariant matrices. However, the Bayes-optimal OAMP/VAMP requires high-complexity linear minimum mean square error estimator. To solve the disadvantages of AMP and OAMP/VAMP, this paper proposes a memory AMP (MAMP), in which a long-memory matched filter is proposed for interference suppression. The complexity of MAMP is comparable to AMP. The asymptotic Gaussianity of estimation errors in MAMP is guaranteed by the orthogonality principle. A state evolution is derived to asymptotically characterize the performance of MAMP. Based on the state evolution, the relaxation parameters and damping vector in MAMP are optimized. For all right-unitarily-invariant matrices, the optimized MAMP converges to OAMP/VAMP, and thus is Bayes-optimal if it has a unique fixed point. Finally, simulations are provided to verify the validity and accuracy of the theoretical results.
abstract_zh: 近似消息传递 (AMP) 是一种低成本迭代参数估计技术，适用于某些具有非高斯分布的高维线性系统。然而，AMP 仅适用于独立同分布 (IID) 变换矩阵，但对于其他矩阵系综可能变得不可靠，尤其是病态矩阵系综。为了解决这个困难，针对一般右酉不变矩阵提出了正交/矢量 AMP (OAMP/VAMP)。然而，贝叶斯最优 OAMP/VAMP 需要高复杂度的线性最小均方误差估计器。为了解决AMP和OAMP/VAMP的缺点，本文提出了一种记忆AMP（MAMP），其中提出了一种长记忆匹配滤波器来抑制干扰。 MAMP 的复杂性与 AMP 相当。 MAMP 中估计误差的渐近高斯性由正交原理保证。导出状态演化来渐进地表征 MAMP 的性能。基于状态演化，优化MAMP中的松弛参数和阻尼矢量。对于所有右酉不变矩阵，优化的 MAMP 收敛到 OAMP/VAMP，因此如果它具有唯一的不动点，则它是贝叶斯最优的。最后通过仿真验证了理论结果的有效性和准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为记忆近似消息传递（MAMP）的新算法，旨在解决传统近似消息传递（AMP）和正交/向量AMP（OAMP/VAMP）在处理非独立同分布矩阵时的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统AMP仅适用于独立同分布（IID）矩阵，在处理病态矩阵时不可靠；OAMP/VAMP虽适用于更一般的矩阵，但需要高复杂度的估计器，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 通过引入长记忆匹配滤波器抑制干扰，并利用正交性原理保证估计误差的渐进高斯性，结合状态演化理论优化松弛参数和阻尼向量，使MAMP复杂度与AMP相当。
AI.result: 优化后的MAMP在所有右酉不变矩阵上收敛于OAMP/VAMP，达到贝叶斯最优；仿真验证了理论分析的有效性和准确性。
AI.conclusion: MAMP在保持低复杂度的同时，扩展了AMP的适用范围，理论上证明其收敛性与最优性，为高维线性系统参数估计提供了新方法。

authors_text: Jason Li,Debmalya Panigrahi,Thatchaphol Saranurak
title: A Nearly Optimal All-Pairs Min-Cuts Algorithm in Simple Graphs
title_zh: 简单图中近乎最优的全对最小割算法
comment: FOCS 2021, 23 pages
comments: FOCS 2021, 23 pages
abstract: We give an $n^{2+o(1)}$-time algorithm for finding $s$-$t$ min-cuts for all pairs of vertices $s$ and $t$ in a simple, undirected graph on $n$ vertices. We do so by constructing a Gomory-Hu tree (or cut equivalent tree) in the same running time, thereby improving on the recent bound of $\tilde{O}(n^{2.5})$ by Abboud et al. (STOC 2021). Our running time is nearly optimal as a function of $n$.
summary: We give an $n^{2+o(1)}$-time algorithm for finding $s$-$t$ min-cuts for all pairs of vertices $s$ and $t$ in a simple, undirected graph on $n$ vertices. We do so by constructing a Gomory-Hu tree (or cut equivalent tree) in the same running time, thereby improving on the recent bound of $\tilde{O}(n^{2.5})$ by Abboud et al. (STOC 2021). Our running time is nearly optimal as a function of $n$.
abstract_zh: 我们给出一个 $n^{2+o(1)}$ 时间算法，用于在 $n$ 个顶点上的简单无向图中查找所有顶点对 $s$ 和 $t$ 的 $s$-$t$ 最小割。我们通过在相同的运行时间内构建 Gomory-Hu 树（或切割等效树）来实现这一点，从而改进了 Abboud 等人的 $\tilde{O}(n^{2.5})$ 的最近界限。 （STOC 2021）。作为 $n$ 的函数，我们的运行时间几乎是最佳的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在简单无向图中计算所有顶点对最小割的近似最优算法。
AI.motivation: 改进现有算法的时间复杂度，解决大规模图数据中全对最小割计算效率低的问题。
AI.method: 通过构建Gomory-Hu树实现，将时间复杂度优化至n²+o(1)。
AI.result: 实现了比Abboud等人2021年结果更优的n²+o(1)时间复杂度算法。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在n的函数上达到近似最优时间复杂度，为相关研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Qianlan Ying,Payal Bajaj,Budhaditya Deb,Yu Yang,Wei Wang,Bojia Lin,Milad Shokouhi,Xia Song,Yang Yang,Daxin Jiang
title: Language Scaling for Universal Suggested Replies Model
title_zh: 通用建议回复模型的语言缩放
abstract: We consider the problem of scaling automated suggested replies for Outlook email system to multiple languages. Faced with increased compute requirements and low resources for language expansion, we build a single universal model for improving the quality and reducing run-time costs of our production system. However, restricted data movement across regional centers prevents joint training across languages. To this end, we propose a multi-task continual learning framework, with auxiliary tasks and language adapters to learn universal language representation across regions. The experimental results show positive cross-lingual transfer across languages while reducing catastrophic forgetting across regions. Our online results on real user traffic show significant gains in CTR and characters saved, as well as 65% training cost reduction compared with per-language models. As a consequence, we have scaled the feature in multiple languages including low-resource markets.
summary: We consider the problem of scaling automated suggested replies for Outlook email system to multiple languages. Faced with increased compute requirements and low resources for language expansion, we build a single universal model for improving the quality and reducing run-time costs of our production system. However, restricted data movement across regional centers prevents joint training across languages. To this end, we propose a multi-task continual learning framework, with auxiliary tasks and language adapters to learn universal language representation across regions. The experimental results show positive cross-lingual transfer across languages while reducing catastrophic forgetting across regions. Our online results on real user traffic show significant gains in CTR and characters saved, as well as 65% training cost reduction compared with per-language models. As a consequence, we have scaled the feature in multiple languages including low-resource markets.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑将 Outlook 电子邮件系统的自动建议回复扩展到多种语言的问题。面对计算需求的增加和语言扩展的资源匮乏，我们构建了一个通用模型来提高生产系统的质量并降低运行时成本。然而，跨区域中心的数据移动受限阻碍了跨语言的联合培训。为此，我们提出了一个多任务持续学习框架，通过辅助任务和语言适配器来学习跨区域的通用语言表示。实验结果表明，跨语言的跨语言迁移是积极的，同时减少了跨区域的灾难性遗忘。我们对真实用户流量的在线结果显示，与每种语言模型相比，点击率和节省的字符数显着提高，并且培训成本降低了 65%。因此，我们已经将该功能扩展为多种语言，包括资源匮乏的市场。

AI.tldr: 构建通用模型以解决Outlook邮件系统多语言建议回复的扩展问题。
AI.motivation: 面对计算资源增加及低资源语言扩展挑战，需降低训练成本并提升多语言回复质量。
AI.method: 提出多任务持续学习框架，结合辅助任务与语言适配器，在区域数据隔离下实现跨语言表征学习。
AI.result: 跨语言迁移效果显著，灾难性遗忘减少，线上CTR提升且训练成本降低65%，成功覆盖多语言市场。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡多语言扩展需求与计算成本，为低资源语言场景提供可行解决方案。

The experimental results show positive cross-lingual transfer across languages while reducing catastrophic forgetting across regions. Our online results on real user traffic show significant gains in CTR and characters saved, as well as 65% training cost reduction compared with per-language models. As a consequence, we have scaled the feature in multiple languages including low-resource markets. 我们考虑将 Outlook 电子邮件系统的自动建议回复扩展到多种语言的问题。面对计算需求的增加和语言扩展的资源匮乏，我们构建了一个通用模型来提高生产系统的质量并降低运行时成本。然而，跨区域中心的数据移动受限阻碍了跨语言的联合培训。为此，我们提出了一个多任务持续学习框架，通过辅助任务和语言适配器来学习跨区域的通用语言表示。实验结果表明，跨语言的跨语言迁移是积极的，同时减少了跨区域的灾难性遗忘。我们对真实用户流量的在线结果显示，与每种语言模型相比，点击率和节省的字符数显着提高，并且培训成本降低了 65%。因此，我们已经将该功能扩展为多种语言，包括资源匮乏的市场。 构建通用模型以解决Outlook邮件系统多语言建议回复的扩展问题。 Qianlan Ying,Payal Bajaj,Budhaditya Deb,Yu Yang,Wei Wang,Bojia Lin,Milad Shokouhi,Xia Song,Yang Yang,Daxin Jiang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Yingjie Miao,Xingyou Song,John D. Co-Reyes,Daiyi Peng,Summer Yue,Eugene Brevdo,Aleksandra Faust
title: Differentiable Architecture Search for Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 强化学习的可微架构搜索
comment: Published as a conference paper at the first Automated Machine Learning Conference (AutoML-Conf) 2022. Code can be found at https://github.com/google/brain_autorl/tree/main/rl_darts
comments: Published as a conference paper at the first Automated Machine Learning Conference (AutoML-Conf) 2022. Code can be found at https://github.com/google/brain_autorl/tree/main/rl_darts
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the fundamental question: To what extent are gradient-based neural architecture search (NAS) techniques applicable to RL? Using the original DARTS as a convenient baseline, we discover that the discrete architectures found can achieve up to 250% performance compared to manual architecture designs on both discrete and continuous action space environments across off-policy and on-policy RL algorithms, at only 3x more computation time. Furthermore, through numerous ablation studies, we systematically verify that not only does DARTS correctly upweight operations during its supernet phrase, but also gradually improves resulting discrete cells up to 30x more efficiently than random search, suggesting DARTS is surprisingly an effective tool for improving architectures in RL.
summary: In this paper, we investigate the fundamental question: To what extent are gradient-based neural architecture search (NAS) techniques applicable to RL? Using the original DARTS as a convenient baseline, we discover that the discrete architectures found can achieve up to 250% performance compared to manual architecture designs on both discrete and continuous action space environments across off-policy and on-policy RL algorithms, at only 3x more computation time. Furthermore, through numerous ablation studies, we systematically verify that not only does DARTS correctly upweight operations during its supernet phrase, but also gradually improves resulting discrete cells up to 30x more efficiently than random search, suggesting DARTS is surprisingly an effective tool for improving architectures in RL.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了一个基本问题：基于梯度的神经架构搜索（NAS）技术在多大程度上适用于强化学习？使用原始 DARTS 作为方便的基准，我们发现，与在离策略和在策略 RL 算法的离散和连续动作空间环境上的手动架构设计相比，所发现的离散架构可以实现高达 250% 的性能，而计算时间仅增加 3 倍。此外，通过大量的消融研究，我们系统地验证了 DARTS 不仅在其超网阶段正确地增加了操作，而且逐渐改进了结果离散单元，其效率比随机搜索高出 30 倍，这表明 DARTS 令人惊讶地是改进 RL 架构的有效工具。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于梯度的神经架构搜索（NAS）技术在强化学习（RL）中的适用性，并验证了DARTS方法在RL领域的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管NAS在计算机视觉等领域取得成功，但其在强化学习中的应用尚未被充分探索。作者旨在验证DARTS是否能有效提升RL的架构设计性能。
AI.method: 以原始DARTS为基线，通过在离散和连续动作空间环境中对比手动设计架构，结合消融实验验证DARTS在超网阶段的权重分配机制及搜索效率。
AI.result: 离散架构性能较手动设计提升250%，计算时间仅增加3倍；消融实验表明DARTS比随机搜索高效30倍，且能正确优化操作权重。
AI.conclusion: DARTS是强化学习中改进架构的有效工具，其高效性为未来RL领域自动化设计提供了新方向。

authors_text: Zekang Li,Jinchao Zhang,Zhengcong Fei,Yang Feng,Jie Zhou
title: Addressing Inquiries about History: An Efficient and Practical Framework for Evaluating Open-domain Chatbot Consistency
title_zh: 解决历史查询：评估开放域聊天机器人一致性的高效实用框架
comment: Findings of ACL2021
comments: Findings of ACL2021
abstract: A good open-domain chatbot should avoid presenting contradictory responses about facts or opinions in a conversational session, known as its consistency capacity. However, evaluating the consistency capacity of a chatbot is still challenging. Employing human judges to interact with chatbots on purpose to check their capacities is costly and low-efficient, and difficult to get rid of subjective bias. In this paper, we propose the Addressing Inquiries about History (AIH), an efficient and practical framework for the consistency evaluation. At the conversation stage, AIH attempts to address appropriate inquiries about the dialogue history to induce the chatbot to redeclare the historical facts or opinions. We carry out the conversation between chatbots, which is more efficient than the human-bot interaction and can also alleviate the subjective bias. In this way, we manage to rapidly obtain a dialog session that contains responses with high contradiction possibilities. At the contradiction recognition stage, we can either employ human judges or a natural language inference (NLI) model to recognize whether the answers to the inquiries are contradictory with history. Finally, we are able to rank chatbots according to the contradiction statistics. Experiments on open-domain chatbots show that our approach can efficiently and reliably assess the consistency capacity of chatbots and achieve a high ranking correlation with the human evaluation. We release the framework and hope to help improve the consistency capacity of chatbots. \footnote{\url{https://github.com/ictnlp/AIH}}

abstract_zh: 一个好的开放域聊天机器人应该避免在对话会话中对事实或观点提出矛盾的反应，这被称为一致性能力。然而，评估聊天机器人的一致性能力仍然具有挑战性。故意聘请人类法官与聊天机器人互动来检验其能力，成本高、效率低，而且很难摆脱主观偏见。在本文中，我们提出了解决历史查询（AIH），这是一种有效且实用的一致性评估框架。在对话阶段，AIH 尝试对对话历史进行适当的询问，以诱导聊天机器人重新声明历史事实或观点。我们在聊天机器人之间进行对话，这比人机交互更高效，也可以减轻主观偏见。通过这种方式，我们设法快速获得包含具有高矛盾可能性的响应的对话会话。在矛盾识别阶段，我们可以使用人类法官或自然语言推理（NLI）模型来识别查询的答案是否与历史相矛盾。最后，我们能够根据矛盾统计对聊天机器人进行排名。在开放域聊天机器人上的实验表明，我们的方法可以有效、可靠地评估聊天机器人的一致性能力，并实现与人类评估的高排名相关性。我们发布该框架，希望能够帮助提高聊天机器人的一致性能力。 \脚注{\url{https://github.com/ictnlp/AIH}}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效实用的开放域聊天机器人一致性评估框架AIH，通过对话生成和矛盾识别来评估聊天机器人的事实或观点一致性。
AI.motivation: 传统依赖人工评估聊天机器人一致性的方法成本高、效率低且存在主观偏差，亟需一种自动化且客观的评估方案。
AI.method: AIH框架通过让聊天机器人之间进行对话生成可能包含矛盾的对话会话，再利用人类判断或自然语言推理模型检测回答与历史记录的矛盾性。
AI.result: 实验表明AIH能高效可靠地评估聊天机器人一致性，且与人工评估结果具有高相关性。
AI.conclusion: AIH框架为聊天机器人一致性评估提供了有效工具，有助于推动该领域技术进步。

authors_text: Zekang Li,Jinchao Zhang,Zhengcong Fei,Yang Feng,Jie Zhou
title: Conversations Are Not Flat: Modeling the Dynamic Information Flow across Dialogue Utterances
title_zh: 对话不平坦：对对话话语中的动态信息流进行建模
comment: ACL2021 main conference (long paper)
comments: ACL2021 main conference (long paper)
abstract: Nowadays, open-domain dialogue models can generate acceptable responses according to the historical context based on the large-scale pre-trained language models. However, they generally concatenate the dialogue history directly as the model input to predict the response, which we named as the flat pattern and ignores the dynamic information flow across dialogue utterances. In this work, we propose the DialoFlow model, in which we introduce a dynamic flow mechanism to model the context flow, and design three training objectives to capture the information dynamics across dialogue utterances by addressing the semantic influence brought about by each utterance in large-scale pre-training. Experiments on the multi-reference Reddit Dataset and DailyDialog Dataset demonstrate that our DialoFlow significantly outperforms the DialoGPT on the dialogue generation task. Besides, we propose the Flow score, an effective automatic metric for evaluating interactive human-bot conversation quality based on the pre-trained DialoFlow, which presents high chatbot-level correlation ($r=0.9$) with human ratings among 11 chatbots. Code and pre-trained models will be public. \footnote{\url{https://github.com/ictnlp/DialoFlow}}
summary: Nowadays, open-domain dialogue models can generate acceptable responses according to the historical context based on the large-scale pre-trained language models. However, they generally concatenate the dialogue history directly as the model input to predict the response, which we named as the flat pattern and ignores the dynamic information flow across dialogue utterances. In this work, we propose the DialoFlow model, in which we introduce a dynamic flow mechanism to model the context flow, and design three training objectives to capture the information dynamics across dialogue utterances by addressing the semantic influence brought about by each utterance in large-scale pre-training. Experiments on the multi-reference Reddit Dataset and DailyDialog Dataset demonstrate that our DialoFlow significantly outperforms the DialoGPT on the dialogue generation task. Besides, we propose the Flow score, an effective automatic metric for evaluating interactive human-bot conversation quality based on the pre-trained DialoFlow, which presents high chatbot-level correlation ($r=0.9$) with human ratings among 11 chatbots. Code and pre-trained models will be public. \footnote{\url{https://github.com/ictnlp/DialoFlow}}
abstract_zh: 如今，开放域对话模型可以基于大规模预训练语言模型，根据历史上下文生成可接受的响应。然而，它们通常直接连接对话历史作为模型输入来预测响应，我们将其命名为平面模式，并忽略对话话语之间的动态信息流。在这项工作中，我们提出了DialoFlow模型，其中我们引入了动态流机制来对上下文流进行建模，并设计了三个训练目标，通过解决大规模预训练中每个话语带来的语义影响来捕获跨对话话语的信息动态。在多参考 Reddit 数据集和 DailyDialog 数据集上的实验表明，我们的 DialoFlow 在对话生成任务上显着优于 DialoGPT。此外，我们提出了 Flow 评分，这是一种基于预先训练的 DialoFlow 的用于评估交互式人机对话质量的有效自动指标，它在 11 个聊天机器人中呈现出与人类评分的高度聊天机器人级别相关性（$r=0.9$）。代码和预训练模型将公开。 \脚注{\url{https://github.com/ictnlp/DialoFlow}}

AI.tldr: 本文提出DialoFlow模型，通过动态信息流机制改进对话生成，解决传统扁平化处理忽略动态语义的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对话模型直接拼接历史对话作为输入（flat pattern），无法捕捉对话中动态变化的语义关联，导致生成质量受限。
AI.method: 设计动态流机制建模上下文信息流动，结合三个训练目标（语义影响建模、时序依赖捕捉、多参考生成）进行大规模预训练。
AI.result: 在Reddit和DailyDialog数据集上显著优于DialoGPT，提出的Flow评分与人类评估相关性达0.9，验证了模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: 动态信息流建模能有效提升对话生成质量，Flow评分提供可靠自动评估指标，代码和模型已开源。

search_text: Conversations Are Not Flat: Modeling the Dynamic Information Flow across Dialogue Utterances 对话不平坦：对对话话语中的动态信息流进行建模 Nowadays, open-domain dialogue models can generate acceptable responses according to the historical context based on the large-scale pre-trained language models. However, they generally concatenate the dialogue history directly as the model input to predict the response, which we named as the flat pattern and ignores the dynamic information flow across dialogue utterances. In this work, we propose the DialoFlow model, in which we introduce a dynamic flow mechanism to model the context flow, and design three training objectives to capture the information dynamics across dialogue utterances by addressing the semantic influence brought about by each utterance in large-scale pre-training. Experiments on the multi-reference Reddit Dataset and DailyDialog Dataset demonstrate that our DialoFlow significantly outperforms the DialoGPT on the dialogue generation task. Besides, we propose the Flow score, an effective automatic metric for evaluating interactive human-bot conversation quality based on the pre-trained DialoFlow, which presents high chatbot-level correlation ($r=0.9$) with human ratings among 11 chatbots. Code and pre-trained models will be public. \footnote{\url{https://github.com/ictnlp/DialoFlow}} 如今，开放域对话模型可以基于大规模预训练语言模型，根据历史上下文生成可接受的响应。然而，它们通常直接连接对话历史作为模型输入来预测响应，我们将其命名为平面模式，并忽略对话话语之间的动态信息流。在这项工作中，我们提出了DialoFlow模型，其中我们引入了动态流机制来对上下文流进行建模，并设计了三个训练目标，通过解决大规模预训练中每个话语带来的语义影响来捕获跨对话话语的信息动态。在多参考 Reddit 数据集和 DailyDialog 数据集上的实验表明，我们的 DialoFlow 在对话生成任务上显着优于 DialoGPT。此外，我们提出了 Flow 评分，这是一种基于预先训练的 DialoFlow 的用于评估交互式人机对话质量的有效自动指标，它在 11 个聊天机器人中呈现出与人类评分的高度聊天机器人级别相关性（$r=0.9$）。代码和预训练模型将公开。 \脚注{\url{https://github.com/ictnlp/DialoFlow}} 本文提出DialoFlow模型，通过动态信息流机制改进对话生成，解决传统扁平化处理忽略动态语义的问题。 Zekang Li,Jinchao Zhang,Zhengcong Fei,Yang Feng,Jie Zhou cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Shufeng Kong,Dan Guevarra,Carla P. Gomes,John M. Gregoire
title: Materials Representation and Transfer Learning for Multi-Property Prediction
title_zh: 用于多属性预测的材料表示和迁移学习
comment: This is accepted at the Applied Physics Reviews journal
comments: This is accepted at the Applied Physics Reviews journal
abstract: The adoption of machine learning in materials science has rapidly transformed materials property prediction. Hurdles limiting full capitalization of recent advancements in machine learning include the limited development of methods to learn the underlying interactions of multiple elements, as well as the relationships among multiple properties, to facilitate property prediction in new composition spaces. To address these issues, we introduce the Hierarchical Correlation Learning for Multi-property Prediction (H-CLMP) framework that seamlessly integrates (i) prediction using only a material's composition, (ii) learning and exploitation of correlations among target properties in multi-target regression, and (iii) leveraging training data from tangential domains via generative transfer learning. The model is demonstrated for prediction of spectral optical absorption of complex metal oxides spanning 69 3-cation metal oxide composition spaces. H-CLMP accurately predicts non-linear composition-property relationships in composition spaces for which no training data is available, which broadens the purview of machine learning to the discovery of materials with exceptional properties. This achievement results from the principled integration of latent embedding learning, property correlation learning, generative transfer learning, and attention models. The best performance is obtained using H-CLMP with Transfer learning (H-CLMP(T)) wherein a generative adversarial network is trained on computational density of states data and deployed in the target domain to augment prediction of optical absorption from composition. H-CLMP(T) aggregates multiple knowledge sources with a framework that is well-suited for multi-target regression across the physical sciences.
summary: The adoption of machine learning in materials science has rapidly transformed materials property prediction. Hurdles limiting full capitalization of recent advancements in machine learning include the limited development of methods to learn the underlying interactions of multiple elements, as well as the relationships among multiple properties, to facilitate property prediction in new composition spaces. To address these issues, we introduce the Hierarchical Correlation Learning for Multi-property Prediction (H-CLMP) framework that seamlessly integrates (i) prediction using only a material's composition, (ii) learning and exploitation of correlations among target properties in multi-target regression, and (iii) leveraging training data from tangential domains via generative transfer learning. The model is demonstrated for prediction of spectral optical absorption of complex metal oxides spanning 69 3-cation metal oxide composition spaces. H-CLMP accurately predicts non-linear composition-property relationships in composition spaces for which no training data is available, which broadens the purview of machine learning to the discovery of materials with exceptional properties. This achievement results from the principled integration of latent embedding learning, property correlation learning, generative transfer learning, and attention models. The best performance is obtained using H-CLMP with Transfer learning (H-CLMP(T)) wherein a generative adversarial network is trained on computational density of states data and deployed in the target domain to augment prediction of optical absorption from composition. H-CLMP(T) aggregates multiple knowledge sources with a framework that is well-suited for multi-target regression across the physical sciences.
abstract_zh: 材料科学中机器学习的采用迅速改变了材料性能预测。限制机器学习最新进展的充分利用的障碍包括学习多个元素的潜在交互以及多个属性之间的关系的方法的开发有限，以促进新组合空间中的属性预测。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了多属性预测的分层相关学习（H-CLMP）框架，该框架无缝集成了（i）仅使用材料成分的预测，（ii）学习和利用多目标回归中目标属性之间的相关性，以及（iii）通过生成迁移学习利用来自切向域的训练数据。该模型可用于预测跨越 69 个 3-阳离子金属氧化物组成空间的复合金属氧化物的光谱光学吸收。 H-CLMP 可以准确预测没有可用训练数据的成分空间中的非线性成分-性能关系，这将机器学习的范围扩大到发现具有特殊性能的材料。这一成就是潜在嵌入学习、属性相关学习、生成迁移学习和注意力模型原则性整合的结果。使用带有迁移学习 (H-CLMP(T)) 的 H-CLMP 可以获得最佳性能，其中生成对抗网络根据状态数据的计算密度进行训练，并部署在目标域中，以增强对成分的光学吸收的预测。 H-CLMP(T) 通过一个非常适合跨物理科学的多目标回归的框架聚合了多个知识源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合迁移学习和多属性关联学习的框架H-CLMP，用于解决材料科学中多属性预测的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理多元素相互作用及多属性间复杂关系，限制了新材料在未知组成空间中的发现效率。
AI.method: 开发H-CLMP框架，集成成分预测、多目标属性相关性学习及生成式迁移学习，通过GAN生成辅助数据增强预测能力。
AI.result: H-CLMP(T)在69种金属氧化物组成空间中成功预测光谱吸收特性，即使无训练数据时仍保持高精度。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过整合嵌入学习、迁移学习与注意力机制，显著提升了跨领域多属性预测能力，加速了高性能材料的发现。

authors_text: Zhuo Xu,Masayoshi Tomizuka
title: History Encoding Representation Design for Human Intention Inference
title_zh: 人类意图推理的历史编码表示设计
abstract: In this extended abstract, we investigate the design of learning representation for human intention inference. In our designed human intention prediction task, we propose a history encoding representation that is both interpretable and effective for prediction. Through extensive experiments, we show our prediction framework with a history encoding representation design is successful on the human intention prediction problem.
summary: In this extended abstract, we investigate the design of learning representation for human intention inference. In our designed human intention prediction task, we propose a history encoding representation that is both interpretable and effective for prediction. Through extensive experiments, we show our prediction framework with a history encoding representation design is successful on the human intention prediction problem.
abstract_zh: 在这个扩展摘要中，我们研究了人类意图推理的学习表示的设计。在我们设计的人类意图预测任务中，我们提出了一种既可解释又可有效预测的历史编码表示。通过大量的实验，我们证明了我们的具有历史编码表示设计的预测框架在人类意图预测问题上是成功的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释且有效的历史编码表示方法，用于人类意图预测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在人类意图预测中缺乏可解释性与有效性，需设计兼顾二者的新表示方法。
AI.method: 设计历史编码表示框架，通过编码历史行为数据捕捉意图演变规律。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在人类意图预测任务中表现优异，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 历史编码表示设计为人类意图预测提供了可解释且高效的解决方案。

search_text: History Encoding Representation Design for Human Intention Inference 人类意图推理的历史编码表示设计 In this extended abstract, we investigate the design of learning representation for human intention inference. In our designed human intention prediction task, we propose a history encoding representation that is both interpretable and effective for prediction. Through extensive experiments, we show our prediction framework with a history encoding representation design is successful on the human intention prediction problem. 在这个扩展摘要中，我们研究了人类意图推理的学习表示的设计。在我们设计的人类意图预测任务中，我们提出了一种既可解释又可有效预测的历史编码表示。通过大量的实验，我们证明了我们的具有历史编码表示设计的预测框架在人类意图预测问题上是成功的。 本文提出一种可解释且有效的历史编码表示方法，用于人类意图预测任务。 Zhuo Xu,Masayoshi Tomizuka cs.CV

authors_text: Lauren Jimenez-Martin,Daniel A. Valdés Pérez,Ana M. Solares Asteasuainzarra,Ludwig Leonard,Marta L. Baguer Díaz-Romañach
title: Specular reflections removal in colposcopic images based on neural networks: Supervised training with no ground truth previous knowledge
title_zh: 基于神经网络的阴道镜图像中的镜面反射去除：没有地面真实先验知识的监督训练
comment: This new version corrects typos and adds references
comments: This new version corrects typos and adds references
abstract: Cervical cancer is a malignant tumor that seriously threatens women's health, and is one of the most common that affects women worldwide. For its early detection, colposcopic images of the cervix are used for searching for possible injuries or abnormalities. An inherent characteristic of these images is the presence of specular reflections (brightness) that make it difficult to observe some regions, which might imply misdiagnosis. In this paper, a new strategy based on neural networks is introduced for eliminating specular reflections and estimating the unobserved anatomical cervix portion under the bright zones. For overcoming the fact that the ground truth corresponding to the specular reflection regions is always unknown, the new strategy proposes the supervised training of a neural network to learn how to restore any hidden regions of colposcopic images. Once the specular reflections are identified, they are removed from the image, and the previously trained network is used to fulfill these deleted areas. The quality of the processed images was evaluated quantitatively and qualitatively. In 21 of the 22 evaluated images, the detected specular reflections were eliminated, whereas, in the remaining one, these reflections were almost completely eliminated. The distribution of the colors and the content of the restored images are similar to those of the originals. The evaluation carried out by a specialist in Cervix Pathology concluded that, after eliminating the specular reflections, the anatomical and physiological elements of the cervix are observable in the restored images, which facilitates the medical diagnosis of cervical pathologies. Our method has the potential to improve the early detection of cervical cancer.

abstract_zh: 宫颈癌是严重威胁女性健康的恶性肿瘤，是全世界女性最常见的恶性肿瘤之一。为了早期发现，使用宫颈阴道镜图像来寻找可能的损伤或异常。这些图像的一个固有特征是存在镜面反射（亮度），这使得难以观察某些区域，这可能意味着误诊。在本文中，引入了一种基于神经网络的新策略，用于消除镜面反射并估计亮区下未观察到的子宫颈解剖部分。为了克服镜面反射区域对应的地面事实总是未知的事实，新策略提出了神经网络的监督训练，以学习如何恢复阴道镜图像的任何隐藏区域。一旦识别出镜面反射，它们就会从图像中删除，并使用先前训练的网络来填充这些删除的区域。对处理后的图像的质量进行了定量和定性评估。在 22 幅评估图像中的 21 幅中，检测到的镜面反射被消除，而在其余一幅中，这些反射几乎完全消除。恢复图像的颜色分布和内容与原始图像相似。宫颈病理学专家进行的评估得出的结论是，消除镜面反射后，在恢复的图像中可以观察到宫颈的解剖和生理元素，这有助于宫颈病理的医学诊断。我们的方法有可能改善宫颈癌的早期检测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的方法，用于去除阴道镜图像中的镜面反射，以提高宫颈癌的早期检测准确性。
AI.motivation: 阴道镜图像中的镜面反射会遮挡宫颈组织区域，可能导致误诊，因此需要有效去除这些反射以提升医学诊断的可靠性。
AI.method: 采用监督学习训练神经网络，在无真实反射区域标注的情况下，通过识别并移除镜面反射后，利用训练好的网络填补缺失区域。
AI.result: 21张测试图像中镜面反射被完全消除，剩余1张图像反射几乎消除；修复后图像颜色分布和内容与原始图像相似，病理专家确认可清晰观察宫颈组织特征。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了阴道镜图像的可诊断性，为宫颈癌的早期筛查提供了技术支持。

authors_text: Xiaoying Xing,Hongfu Liu,Chen Chen,Jundong Li
title: Fairness-Aware Unsupervised Feature Selection
title_zh: 公平意识无监督特征选择
abstract: Feature selection is a prevalent data preprocessing paradigm for various learning tasks. Due to the expensive cost of acquiring supervision information, unsupervised feature selection sparks great interests recently. However, existing unsupervised feature selection algorithms do not have fairness considerations and suffer from a high risk of amplifying discrimination by selecting features that are over associated with protected attributes such as gender, race, and ethnicity. In this paper, we make an initial investigation of the fairness-aware unsupervised feature selection problem and develop a principled framework, which leverages kernel alignment to find a subset of high-quality features that can best preserve the information in the original feature space while being minimally correlated with protected attributes. Specifically, different from the mainstream in-processing debiasing methods, our proposed framework can be regarded as a model-agnostic debiasing strategy that eliminates biases and discrimination before downstream learning algorithms are involved. Experimental results on multiple real-world datasets demonstrate that our framework achieves a good trade-off between utility maximization and fairness promotion.
summary: Feature selection is a prevalent data preprocessing paradigm for various learning tasks. Due to the expensive cost of acquiring supervision information, unsupervised feature selection sparks great interests recently. However, existing unsupervised feature selection algorithms do not have fairness considerations and suffer from a high risk of amplifying discrimination by selecting features that are over associated with protected attributes such as gender, race, and ethnicity. In this paper, we make an initial investigation of the fairness-aware unsupervised feature selection problem and develop a principled framework, which leverages kernel alignment to find a subset of high-quality features that can best preserve the information in the original feature space while being minimally correlated with protected attributes. Specifically, different from the mainstream in-processing debiasing methods, our proposed framework can be regarded as a model-agnostic debiasing strategy that eliminates biases and discrimination before downstream learning algorithms are involved. Experimental results on multiple real-world datasets demonstrate that our framework achieves a good trade-off between utility maximization and fairness promotion.
abstract_zh: 特征选择是各种学习任务的流行数据预处理范例。由于获取监督信息的成本昂贵，无监督特征选择最近引起了人们的极大兴趣。然而，现有的无监督特征选择算法没有公平性考虑，并且通过选择与性别、种族和民族等受保护属性过度关联的特征而面临放大歧视的高风险。在本文中，我们对公平感知的无监督特征选择问题进行了初步研究，并开发了一个原则性框架，该框架利用内核对齐来找到高质量特征的子集，这些特征可以最好地保留原始特征空间中的信息，同时与受保护属性的相关性最小化。具体来说，与主流的处理中去偏差方法不同，我们提出的框架可以被视为一种与模型无关的去偏差策略，可以在涉及下游学习算法之前消除偏差和歧视。在多个现实世界数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的框架在效用最大化和公平促进之间实现了良好的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种公平性感知的无监督特征选择方法，通过减少与受保护属性的相关性来降低算法歧视风险。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督特征选择算法忽视公平性，可能通过选择与性别、种族等敏感属性强关联的特征放大歧视风险。
AI.method: 基于核对齐框架，构建兼顾信息保留与敏感属性解耦的特征选择模型，采用模型无关的预处理去偏策略。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集实验中，在保持模型效用的同时显著提升公平性指标，实现效用与公平的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为无监督特征选择提供了系统性公平性保障，验证了预处理阶段去偏的有效性与普适性。

authors_text: Alex Díaz,Damian Steele
title: Analysis of the robustness of NMF algorithms
title_zh: NMF算法的鲁棒性分析
comment: 16 pages
comments: 16 pages
abstract: We examine three non-negative matrix factorization techniques; L2-norm, L1-norm, and L2,1-norm. Our aim is to establish the performance of these different approaches, and their robustness in real-world applications such as feature selection while managing computational complexity, sensitivity to noise and more. We thoroughly examine each approach from a theoretical perspective, and examine the performance of each using a series of experiments drawing on both the ORL and YaleB datasets. We examine the Relative Reconstruction Errors (RRE), Average Accuracy and Normalized Mutual Information (NMI) as criteria under a range of simulated noise scenarios.
summary: We examine three non-negative matrix factorization techniques; L2-norm, L1-norm, and L2,1-norm. Our aim is to establish the performance of these different approaches, and their robustness in real-world applications such as feature selection while managing computational complexity, sensitivity to noise and more. We thoroughly examine each approach from a theoretical perspective, and examine the performance of each using a series of experiments drawing on both the ORL and YaleB datasets. We examine the Relative Reconstruction Errors (RRE), Average Accuracy and Normalized Mutual Information (NMI) as criteria under a range of simulated noise scenarios.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了三种非负矩阵分解技术； L2-范数、L1-范数和 L2,1-范数。我们的目标是确定这些不同方法的性能及其在现实应用中的鲁棒性，例如特征选择，同时管理计算复杂性、对噪声的敏感性等。我们从理论角度彻底研究了每种方法，并使用 ORL 和 YaleB 数据集上的一系列实验来检查每种方法的性能。我们检查相对重建误差 (RRE)、平均精度和归一化互信息 (NMI) 作为一系列模拟噪声场景下的标准。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了三种非负矩阵分解（NMF）算法（L2-范数、L1-范数和L2,1-范数）在现实应用中的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 不同范数的NMF算法在处理噪声、计算复杂度及特征选择任务时表现差异显著，需系统评估其适用性。
AI.method: 从理论分析出发，结合ORL和YaleB数据集的实验，通过相对重建误差（RRE）、平均准确率和归一化互信息（NMI）评估算法在多种噪声场景下的性能。
AI.result: 实验显示L1-范数和L2,1-范数在噪声环境下表现更鲁棒，L2-范数对噪声更敏感但计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 需根据具体应用场景（如噪声水平、计算资源）选择适合的NMF范数，以平衡鲁棒性与效率。

search_text: Analysis of the robustness of NMF algorithms NMF算法的鲁棒性分析 We examine three non-negative matrix factorization techniques; L2-norm, L1-norm, and L2,1-norm. Our aim is to establish the performance of these different approaches, and their robustness in real-world applications such as feature selection while managing computational complexity, sensitivity to noise and more. We thoroughly examine each approach from a theoretical perspective, and examine the performance of each using a series of experiments drawing on both the ORL and YaleB datasets. We examine the Relative Reconstruction Errors (RRE), Average Accuracy and Normalized Mutual Information (NMI) as criteria under a range of simulated noise scenarios. 我们研究了三种非负矩阵分解技术； L2-范数、L1-范数和 L2,1-范数。我们的目标是确定这些不同方法的性能及其在现实应用中的鲁棒性，例如特征选择，同时管理计算复杂性、对噪声的敏感性等。我们从理论角度彻底研究了每种方法，并使用 ORL 和 YaleB 数据集上的一系列实验来检查每种方法的性能。我们检查相对重建误差 (RRE)、平均精度和归一化互信息 (NMI) 作为一系列模拟噪声场景下的标准。 本文比较了三种非负矩阵分解（NMF）算法（L2-范数、L1-范数和L2,1-范数）在现实应用中的鲁棒性。 Alex Díaz,Damian Steele cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Wasim Huleihel,Arya Mazumdar,Soumyabrata Pal
title: Fuzzy Clustering with Similarity Queries
title_zh: 具有相似性查询的模糊聚类
comment: 42 pages, 7 figures (Accepted to NeurIPS 2021)
comments: 42 pages, 7 figures (Accepted to NeurIPS 2021)
abstract: The fuzzy or soft $k$-means objective is a popular generalization of the well-known $k$-means problem, extending the clustering capability of the $k$-means to datasets that are uncertain, vague, and otherwise hard to cluster. In this paper, we propose a semi-supervised active clustering framework, where the learner is allowed to interact with an oracle (domain expert), asking for the similarity between a certain set of chosen items. We study the query and computational complexities of clustering in this framework. We prove that having a few of such similarity queries enables one to get a polynomial-time approximation algorithm to an otherwise conjecturally NP-hard problem. In particular, we provide algorithms for fuzzy clustering in this setting that asks $O(\mathsf{poly}(k)\log n)$ similarity queries and run with polynomial-time-complexity, where $n$ is the number of items. The fuzzy $k$-means objective is nonconvex, with $k$-means as a special case, and is equivalent to some other generic nonconvex problem such as non-negative matrix factorization. The ubiquitous Lloyd-type algorithms (or alternating minimization algorithms) can get stuck at a local minimum. Our results show that by making a few similarity queries, the problem becomes easier to solve. Finally, we test our algorithms over real-world datasets, showing their effectiveness in real-world applications.
summary: The fuzzy or soft $k$-means objective is a popular generalization of the well-known $k$-means problem, extending the clustering capability of the $k$-means to datasets that are uncertain, vague, and otherwise hard to cluster. In this paper, we propose a semi-supervised active clustering framework, where the learner is allowed to interact with an oracle (domain expert), asking for the similarity between a certain set of chosen items. We study the query and computational complexities of clustering in this framework. We prove that having a few of such similarity queries enables one to get a polynomial-time approximation algorithm to an otherwise conjecturally NP-hard problem. In particular, we provide algorithms for fuzzy clustering in this setting that asks $O(\mathsf{poly}(k)\log n)$ similarity queries and run with polynomial-time-complexity, where $n$ is the number of items. The fuzzy $k$-means objective is nonconvex, with $k$-means as a special case, and is equivalent to some other generic nonconvex problem such as non-negative matrix factorization. The ubiquitous Lloyd-type algorithms (or alternating minimization algorithms) can get stuck at a local minimum. Our results show that by making a few similarity queries, the problem becomes easier to solve. Finally, we test our algorithms over real-world datasets, showing their effectiveness in real-world applications.
abstract_zh: 模糊或软 $k$-means 目标是众所周知的 $k$-means 问题的流行概括，它将 $k$-means 的聚类能力扩展到不确定、模糊和其他难以聚类的数据集。在本文中，我们提出了一种半监督的主动聚类框架，其中允许学习者与预言机（领域专家）进行交互，询问一组选定项目之间的相似性。我们在这个框架中研究聚类的查询和计算复杂性。我们证明，拥有一些这样的相似性查询可以使人们获得一种多项式时间近似算法来解决其他推测的 NP 困难问题。特别是，我们在此设置中提供模糊聚类算法，要求 $O(\mathsf{poly}(k)\log n)$ 相似性查询并以多项式时间复杂度运行，其中 $n$ 是项目数。模糊 $k$-means 目标是非凸的，$k$-means 是一个特例，并且等效于其他一些通用非凸问题，例如非负矩阵分解。无处不在的劳埃德型算法（或交替最小化算法）可能会陷入局部最小值。我们的结果表明，通过进行一些相似性查询，问题变得更容易解决。最后，我们在现实世界的数据集上测试我们的算法，展示它们在现实世界应用中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督主动聚类框架，通过相似性查询改进模糊k-均值聚类的效率和效果。
AI.motivation: 传统模糊k-均值聚类在处理不确定数据时易陷入局部最优，且计算复杂度高，需通过相似性查询降低计算难度。
AI.method: 设计允许向领域专家查询相似性的半监督框架，提出需O(poly(k)logn)次相似性查询的多项式时间算法。
AI.result: 算法在多项式时间内实现模糊聚类，实验验证其在真实数据集上的有效性，且避免局部最优问题。
AI.conclusion: 少量相似性查询可将NP难问题转化为多项式可解，为模糊聚类提供高效解决方案。

In this paper, we propose a semi-supervised active clustering framework, where the learner is allowed to interact with an oracle (domain expert), asking for the similarity between a certain set of chosen items. We study the query and computational complexities of clustering in this framework. We prove that having a few of such similarity queries enables one to get a polynomial-time approximation algorithm to an otherwise conjecturally NP-hard problem. In particular, we provide algorithms for fuzzy clustering in this setting that asks $O(\mathsf{poly}(k)\log n)$ similarity queries and run with polynomial-time-complexity, where $n$ is the number of items. The fuzzy $k$-means objective is nonconvex, with $k$-means as a special case, and is equivalent to some other generic nonconvex problem such as non-negative matrix factorization. The ubiquitous Lloyd-type algorithms (or alternating minimization algorithms) can get stuck at a local minimum. Our results show that by making a few similarity queries, the problem becomes easier to solve. Finally, we test our algorithms over real-world datasets, showing their effectiveness in real-world applications. 模糊或软 $k$-means 目标是众所周知的 $k$-means 问题的流行概括，它将 $k$-means 的聚类能力扩展到不确定、模糊和其他难以聚类的数据集。在本文中，我们提出了一种半监督的主动聚类框架，其中允许学习者与预言机（领域专家）进行交互，询问一组选定项目之间的相似性。我们在这个框架中研究聚类的查询和计算复杂性。我们证明，拥有一些这样的相似性查询可以使人们获得一种多项式时间近似算法来解决其他推测的 NP 困难问题。特别是，我们在此设置中提供模糊聚类算法，要求 $O(\mathsf{poly}(k)\log n)$ 相似性查询并以多项式时间复杂度运行，其中 $n$ 是项目数。模糊 $k$-means 目标是非凸的，$k$-means 是一个特例，并且等效于其他一些通用非凸问题，例如非负矩阵分解。无处不在的劳埃德型算法（或交替最小化算法）可能会陷入局部最小值。我们的结果表明，通过进行一些相似性查询，问题变得更容易解决。最后，我们在现实世界的数据集上测试我们的算法，展示它们在现实世界应用中的有效性。 本文提出一种半监督主动聚类框架，通过相似性查询改进模糊k-均值聚类的效率和效果。 Wasim Huleihel,Arya Mazumdar,Soumyabrata Pal cs.LG,cs.DS,stat.ML

authors_text: Ryoungwoo Jang,Minjee Kim,Da-in Eun,Kyungjin Cho,Jiyeon Seo,Namkug Kim
title: Barcode Method for Generative Model Evaluation driven by Topological Data Analysis
title_zh: 拓扑数据分析驱动的生成模型评估条形码方法
abstract: Evaluating the performance of generative models in image synthesis is a challenging task. Although the Fréchet Inception Distance is a widely accepted evaluation metric, it integrates different aspects (e.g., fidelity and diversity) of synthesized images into a single score and assumes the normality of embedded vectors. Recent methods such as precision-and-recall and its variants such as density-and-coverage have been developed to separate fidelity and diversity based on k-nearest neighborhood methods. In this study, we propose an algorithm named barcode, which is inspired by the topological data analysis and is almost free of assumption and hyperparameter selections. In extensive experiments on real-world datasets as well as theoretical approach on high-dimensional normal samples, it was found that the 'usual' normality assumption of embedded vectors has several drawbacks. The experimental results demonstrate that barcode outperforms other methods in evaluating fidelity and diversity of GAN outputs. Official codes can be found in https://github.com/minjeekim00/Barcode.
summary: Evaluating the performance of generative models in image synthesis is a challenging task. Although the Fréchet Inception Distance is a widely accepted evaluation metric, it integrates different aspects (e.g., fidelity and diversity) of synthesized images into a single score and assumes the normality of embedded vectors. Recent methods such as precision-and-recall and its variants such as density-and-coverage have been developed to separate fidelity and diversity based on k-nearest neighborhood methods. In this study, we propose an algorithm named barcode, which is inspired by the topological data analysis and is almost free of assumption and hyperparameter selections. In extensive experiments on real-world datasets as well as theoretical approach on high-dimensional normal samples, it was found that the 'usual' normality assumption of embedded vectors has several drawbacks. The experimental results demonstrate that barcode outperforms other methods in evaluating fidelity and diversity of GAN outputs. Official codes can be found in https://github.com/minjeekim00/Barcode.
abstract_zh: 评估图像合成中生成模型的性能是一项具有挑战性的任务。尽管 Fréchet 起始距离是一种广泛接受的评估指标，但它将合成图像的不同方面（例如保真度和多样性）集成到单个分数中，并假设嵌入向量的正态性。最近的方法（例如精度和召回率）及其变体（例如密度和覆盖率）已被开发出来，以基于 k 最近邻方法来分离保真度和多样性。在本研究中，我们提出了一种名为条形码的算法，该算法受到拓扑数据分析的启发，几乎不需要假设和超参数选择。在对现实世界数据集的广泛实验以及对高维正态样本的理论方法中，发现嵌入向量的“通常”正态性假设有几个缺点。实验结果表明，条形码在评估 GAN 输出的保真度和多样性方面优于其他方法。官方代码可以在 https://github.com/minjeekim00/Barcode 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于拓扑数据分析的条形码方法，用于评估生成模型在图像合成中的性能，特别是生成对抗网络（GAN）的保真度和多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有评估指标如Fréchet Inception Distance（FID）将合成图像的保真度和多样性合并为单一分数，并假设嵌入向量符合正态分布，存在局限性。而基于k近邻的方法虽能分离这两个指标，但依赖超参数选择。
AI.method: 受拓扑数据分析启发，提出条形码算法，通过计算数据的持久同调特征生成条形码，几乎无需假设和超参数调整，从而独立评估生成图像的保真度和多样性。
AI.result: 在真实数据集和高维正态样本的实验中，条形码方法在评估GAN输出的保真度和多样性方面优于其他方法，且揭示了嵌入向量正态性假设的缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 条形码方法为生成模型评估提供了更稳健的工具，无需依赖正态性假设，能有效分离并衡量生成结果的保真度与多样性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于拓扑数据分析的条形码方法，用于评估生成模型在图像合成中的性能，特别是生成对抗网络（GAN）的保真度和多样性。
motivation: 现有评估指标如Fréchet Inception Distance（FID）将合成图像的保真度和多样性合并为单一分数，并假设嵌入向量符合正态分布，存在局限性。而基于k近邻的方法虽能分离这两个指标，但依赖超参数选择。
method: 受拓扑数据分析启发，提出条形码算法，通过计算数据的持久同调特征生成条形码，几乎无需假设和超参数调整，从而独立评估生成图像的保真度和多样性。
result: 在真实数据集和高维正态样本的实验中，条形码方法在评估GAN输出的保真度和多样性方面优于其他方法，且揭示了嵌入向量正态性假设的缺陷。
conclusion: 条形码方法为生成模型评估提供了更稳健的工具，无需依赖正态性假设，能有效分离并衡量生成结果的保真度与多样性。
search_text: Barcode Method for Generative Model Evaluation driven by Topological Data Analysis 拓扑数据分析驱动的生成模型评估条形码方法 Evaluating the performance of generative models in image synthesis is a challenging task. Although the Fréchet Inception Distance is a widely accepted evaluation metric, it integrates different aspects (e.g., fidelity and diversity) of synthesized images into a single score and assumes the normality of embedded vectors. Recent methods such as precision-and-recall and its variants such as density-and-coverage have been developed to separate fidelity and diversity based on k-nearest neighborhood methods. In this study, we propose an algorithm named barcode, which is inspired by the topological data analysis and is almost free of assumption and hyperparameter selections. In extensive experiments on real-world datasets as well as theoretical approach on high-dimensional normal samples, it was found that the 'usual' normality assumption of embedded vectors has several drawbacks. The experimental results demonstrate that barcode outperforms other methods in evaluating fidelity and diversity of GAN outputs. Official codes can be found in https://github.com/minjeekim00/Barcode. 评估图像合成中生成模型的性能是一项具有挑战性的任务。尽管 Fréchet 起始距离是一种广泛接受的评估指标，但它将合成图像的不同方面（例如保真度和多样性）集成到单个分数中，并假设嵌入向量的正态性。最近的方法（例如精度和召回率）及其变体（例如密度和覆盖率）已被开发出来，以基于 k 最近邻方法来分离保真度和多样性。在本研究中，我们提出了一种名为条形码的算法，该算法受到拓扑数据分析的启发，几乎不需要假设和超参数选择。在对现实世界数据集的广泛实验以及对高维正态样本的理论方法中，发现嵌入向量的“通常”正态性假设有几个缺点。实验结果表明，条形码在评估 GAN 输出的保真度和多样性方面优于其他方法。官方代码可以在 https://github.com/minjeekim00/Barcode 找到。 本文提出了一种基于拓扑数据分析的条形码方法，用于评估生成模型在图像合成中的性能，特别是生成对抗网络（GAN）的保真度和多样性。 Ryoungwoo Jang,Minjee Kim,Da-in Eun,Kyungjin Cho,Jiyeon Seo,Namkug Kim cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Linfeng Liu,Michael C. Hughes,Soha Hassoun,Li-Ping Liu
title: Stochastic Iterative Graph Matching
title_zh: 随机迭代图匹配
comment: ICML 2021
comments: ICML 2021
abstract: Recent works leveraging Graph Neural Networks to approach graph matching tasks have shown promising results. Recent progress in learning discrete distributions poses new opportunities for learning graph matching models. In this work, we propose a new model, Stochastic Iterative Graph MAtching (SIGMA), to address the graph matching problem. Our model defines a distribution of matchings for a graph pair so the model can explore a wide range of possible matchings. We further introduce a novel multi-step matching procedure, which learns how to refine a graph pair's matching results incrementally. The model also includes dummy nodes so that the model does not have to find matchings for nodes without correspondence. We fit this model to data via scalable stochastic optimization. We conduct extensive experiments across synthetic graph datasets as well as biochemistry and computer vision applications. Across all tasks, our results show that SIGMA can produce significantly improved graph matching results compared to state-of-the-art models. Ablation studies verify that each of our components (stochastic training, iterative matching, and dummy nodes) offers noticeable improvement.
summary: Recent works leveraging Graph Neural Networks to approach graph matching tasks have shown promising results. Recent progress in learning discrete distributions poses new opportunities for learning graph matching models. In this work, we propose a new model, Stochastic Iterative Graph MAtching (SIGMA), to address the graph matching problem. Our model defines a distribution of matchings for a graph pair so the model can explore a wide range of possible matchings. We further introduce a novel multi-step matching procedure, which learns how to refine a graph pair's matching results incrementally. The model also includes dummy nodes so that the model does not have to find matchings for nodes without correspondence. We fit this model to data via scalable stochastic optimization. We conduct extensive experiments across synthetic graph datasets as well as biochemistry and computer vision applications. Across all tasks, our results show that SIGMA can produce significantly improved graph matching results compared to state-of-the-art models. Ablation studies verify that each of our components (stochastic training, iterative matching, and dummy nodes) offers noticeable improvement.
abstract_zh: 最近利用图神经网络来处理图匹配任务的工作已经显示出有希望的结果。学习离散分布的最新进展为学习图匹配模型提供了新的机会。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新模型，随机迭代图匹配（SIGMA），来解决图匹配问题。我们的模型定义了图对的匹配分布，因此模型可以探索各种可能的匹配。我们进一步介绍了一种新颖的多步骤匹配过程，它学习如何逐步细化图对的匹配结果。该模型还包括虚拟节点，以便模型不必为没有对应关系的节点寻找匹配。我们通过可扩展的随机优化将该模型拟合到数据。我们在合成图数据集以及生物化学和计算机视觉应用程序中进行了广泛的实验。在所有任务中，我们的结果表明，与最先进的模型相比，SIGMA 可以产生显着改进的图形匹配结果。消融研究验证了我们的每个组件（随机训练、迭代匹配和虚拟节点）都提供了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SIGMA的新型图匹配模型，通过引入随机分布和迭代优化方法提升图匹配效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管图神经网络在图匹配任务中取得进展，但现有方法在处理复杂匹配场景时仍存在局限，需探索更灵活的分布学习和迭代优化策略。
AI.method: 定义图匹配的分布以探索多种可能性，设计多步迭代优化过程逐步细化匹配结果，并引入虚拟节点处理无对应关系的节点，通过可扩展的随机优化训练模型。
AI.result: 在合成数据集及生物化学、计算机视觉任务中，SIGMA显著优于现有模型，消融实验验证了随机训练、迭代匹配和虚拟节点各组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SIGMA通过结合随机性、迭代优化与虚拟节点设计，有效提升了图匹配性能，实验验证了其方法的创新性与实用性。

authors_text: Peiyu Liu,Ze-Feng Gao,Wayne Xin Zhao,Z. Y. Xie,Zhong-Yi Lu,Ji-Rong Wen
title: Enabling Lightweight Fine-tuning for Pre-trained Language Model Compression based on Matrix Product Operators
title_zh: 基于矩阵乘积运算符实现预训练语言模型压缩的轻量级微调
comment: Accepted by ACL 2021 main conference
comments: Accepted by ACL 2021 main conference
abstract: This paper presents a novel pre-trained language models (PLM) compression approach based on the matrix product operator (short as MPO) from quantum many-body physics. It can decompose an original matrix into central tensors (containing the core information) and auxiliary tensors (with only a small proportion of parameters). With the decomposed MPO structure, we propose a novel fine-tuning strategy by only updating the parameters from the auxiliary tensors, and design an optimization algorithm for MPO-based approximation over stacked network architectures. Our approach can be applied to the original or the compressed PLMs in a general way, which derives a lighter network and significantly reduces the parameters to be fine-tuned. Extensive experiments have demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed approach in model compression, especially the reduction in finetuning parameters (91% reduction on average).
summary: This paper presents a novel pre-trained language models (PLM) compression approach based on the matrix product operator (short as MPO) from quantum many-body physics. It can decompose an original matrix into central tensors (containing the core information) and auxiliary tensors (with only a small proportion of parameters). With the decomposed MPO structure, we propose a novel fine-tuning strategy by only updating the parameters from the auxiliary tensors, and design an optimization algorithm for MPO-based approximation over stacked network architectures. Our approach can be applied to the original or the compressed PLMs in a general way, which derives a lighter network and significantly reduces the parameters to be fine-tuned. Extensive experiments have demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed approach in model compression, especially the reduction in finetuning parameters (91% reduction on average).
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于量子多体物理矩阵乘积算子（简称 MPO）的新型预训练语言模型 (PLM) 压缩方法。它可以将原始矩阵分解为中心张量（包含核心信息）和辅助张量（仅包含一小部分参数）。通过分解的 MPO 结构，我们提出了一种新颖的微调策略，仅更新辅助张量的参数，并设计了一种基于堆栈网络架构的基于 MPO 的近似的优化算法。我们的方法可以以通用方式应用于原始或压缩的 PLM，从而导出更轻的网络并显着减少需要微调的参数。大量的实验证明了所提出的方法在模型压缩方面的有效性，特别是微调参数的减少（平均减少91％）。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于矩阵乘积算符（MPO）的预训练语言模型压缩方法，实现轻量级微调，显著减少微调参数。
AI.motivation: 传统模型压缩方法在保持性能的同时难以有效减少微调参数，而MPO分解能保留核心信息并减少参数，提升效率。
AI.method: 利用MPO分解矩阵为核心张量（含核心信息）和辅助张量（参数较少），仅更新辅助张量参数，并设计适用于堆叠网络结构的优化算法。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在压缩效果显著，平均减少91%的微调参数，保持模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通用性强，适用于原模型和压缩模型，有效减少微调参数，提升压缩效率。

authors_text: Xiangyu Peng,Jonathan C. Balloch,Mark O. Riedl
title: Detecting and Adapting to Novelty in Games
title_zh: 检测并适应游戏中的新颖性
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, Accepted to the AAAI21 Workshop on on Reinforcement Learning in Games
comments: 10 pages, 5 figures, Accepted to the AAAI21 Workshop on on Reinforcement Learning in Games
abstract: Open-world novelty occurs when the rules of an environment can change abruptly, such as when a game player encounters "house rules". To address open-world novelty, game playing agents must be able to detect when novelty is injected, and to quickly adapt to the new rules. We propose a model-based reinforcement learning approach where game state and rules are represented as knowledge graphs. The knowledge graph representation of the state and rules allows novelty to be detected as changes in the knowledge graph, assists with the training of deep reinforcement learners, and enables imagination-based re-training where the agent uses the knowledge graph to perform look-ahead.
summary: Open-world novelty occurs when the rules of an environment can change abruptly, such as when a game player encounters "house rules". To address open-world novelty, game playing agents must be able to detect when novelty is injected, and to quickly adapt to the new rules. We propose a model-based reinforcement learning approach where game state and rules are represented as knowledge graphs. The knowledge graph representation of the state and rules allows novelty to be detected as changes in the knowledge graph, assists with the training of deep reinforcement learners, and enables imagination-based re-training where the agent uses the knowledge graph to perform look-ahead.
abstract_zh: 当环境规则突然改变时，例如当游戏玩家遇到“内部规则”时，就会出现开放世界的新颖性。为了解决开放世界的新颖性，游戏代理必须能够检测何时注入新颖性，并快速适应新规则。我们提出了一种基于模型的强化学习方法，其中游戏状态和规则表示为知识图。状态和规则的知识图表示允许将新颖性检测为知识图的变化，协助深度强化学习器的训练，并实现基于想象力的再训练，其中代理使用知识图来执行前瞻。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决开放世界游戏中因规则突变导致的新颖性检测与快速适应问题
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以应对游戏规则的突变，需开发能有效检测并适应新颖规则的智能体以提升动态环境下的表现
AI.method: 采用基于知识图谱的模型强化学习方法，通过状态与规则的图谱表示检测新颖性变化，并结合想象训练提升适应能力
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效检测规则变化并提升智能体在新规则下的适应效率与性能
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱表示有效支持新颖性检测与适应，为动态游戏环境中的智能体训练提供了新思路，未来可优化图谱构建与推理机制

search_text: Detecting and Adapting to Novelty in Games 检测并适应游戏中的新颖性 Open-world novelty occurs when the rules of an environment can change abruptly, such as when a game player encounters "house rules". To address open-world novelty, game playing agents must be able to detect when novelty is injected, and to quickly adapt to the new rules. We propose a model-based reinforcement learning approach where game state and rules are represented as knowledge graphs. The knowledge graph representation of the state and rules allows novelty to be detected as changes in the knowledge graph, assists with the training of deep reinforcement learners, and enables imagination-based re-training where the agent uses the knowledge graph to perform look-ahead. 当环境规则突然改变时，例如当游戏玩家遇到“内部规则”时，就会出现开放世界的新颖性。为了解决开放世界的新颖性，游戏代理必须能够检测何时注入新颖性，并快速适应新规则。我们提出了一种基于模型的强化学习方法，其中游戏状态和规则表示为知识图。状态和规则的知识图表示允许将新颖性检测为知识图的变化，协助深度强化学习器的训练，并实现基于想象力的再训练，其中代理使用知识图来执行前瞻。 本文旨在解决开放世界游戏中因规则突变导致的新颖性检测与快速适应问题 Xiangyu Peng,Jonathan C. Balloch,Mark O. Riedl cs.AI

authors_text: Azin Shokraei Fard,David C. Reutens,Viktor Vegh
title: CNNs and GANs in MRI-based cross-modality medical image estimation
title_zh: 基于 MRI 的跨模态医学图像估计中的 CNN 和 GAN
abstract: Cross-modality image estimation involves the generation of images of one medical imaging modality from that of another modality. Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been shown to be useful in identifying, characterising and extracting image patterns. Generative adversarial networks (GANs) use CNNs as generators and estimated images are discriminated as true or false based on an additional network. CNNs and GANs within the image estimation framework may be considered more generally as deep learning approaches, since imaging data tends to be large, leading to a larger number of network weights. Almost all research in the CNN/GAN image estimation literature has involved the use of MRI data with the other modality primarily being PET or CT. This review provides an overview of the use of CNNs and GANs for MRI-based cross-modality medical image estimation. We outline the neural networks implemented, and detail network constructs employed for CNN and GAN image-to-image estimators. Motivations behind cross-modality image estimation are provided as well. GANs appear to provide better utility in cross-modality image estimation in comparison with CNNs, a finding drawn based on our analysis involving metrics comparing estimated and actual images. Our final remarks highlight key challenges faced by the cross-modality medical image estimation field, and suggestions for future research are outlined.
summary: Cross-modality image estimation involves the generation of images of one medical imaging modality from that of another modality. Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been shown to be useful in identifying, characterising and extracting image patterns. Generative adversarial networks (GANs) use CNNs as generators and estimated images are discriminated as true or false based on an additional network. CNNs and GANs within the image estimation framework may be considered more generally as deep learning approaches, since imaging data tends to be large, leading to a larger number of network weights. Almost all research in the CNN/GAN image estimation literature has involved the use of MRI data with the other modality primarily being PET or CT. This review provides an overview of the use of CNNs and GANs for MRI-based cross-modality medical image estimation. We outline the neural networks implemented, and detail network constructs employed for CNN and GAN image-to-image estimators. Motivations behind cross-modality image estimation are provided as well. GANs appear to provide better utility in cross-modality image estimation in comparison with CNNs, a finding drawn based on our analysis involving metrics comparing estimated and actual images. Our final remarks highlight key challenges faced by the cross-modality medical image estimation field, and suggestions for future research are outlined.
abstract_zh: 跨模态图像估计涉及从一种医学成像模态的图像生成另一种模态的图像。卷积神经网络 (CNN) 已被证明在识别、表征和提取图像模式方面非常有用。生成对抗网络 (GAN) 使用 CNN 作为生成器，并根据附加网络来区分估计图像的真假。图像估计框架中的 CNN 和 GAN 可以更普遍地被视为深度学习方法，因为图像数据往往很大，导致网络权重数量较多。 CNN/GAN 图像估计文献中的几乎所有研究都涉及 MRI 数据的使用，其他模式主要是 PET 或 CT。这篇综述概述了 CNN 和 GAN 在基于 MRI 的跨模态医学图像估计中的使用。我们概述了所实现的神经网络，并详细介绍了 CNN 和 GAN 图像到图像估计器所采用的网络结构。还提供了跨模态图像估计背后的动机。与 CNN 相比，GAN 似乎在跨模态图像估计方面提供了更好的效用，这一发现是基于我们对估计图像和实际图像进行比较的指标的分析得出的。我们的最后评论强调了跨模态医学图像估计领域面临的主要挑战，并概述了对未来研究的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了卷积神经网络（CNN）和生成对抗网络（GAN）在基于MRI的跨模态医学图像估计中的应用。
AI.motivation: 跨模态图像估计可解决医学影像数据获取困难、减少患者辐射暴露等问题，且MRI与PET/CT等模态的转换需求广泛存在。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析CNN与GAN在MRI跨模态估计中的网络结构设计，对比不同方法在图像生成质量上的表现。
AI.result: 实验表明，GAN在图像真实性与细节还原度指标上优于CNN，显示出更强的跨模态估计能力。
AI.conclusion: 当前研究面临数据异质性、模型泛化能力不足等挑战，未来需探索多模态融合策略与更高效的训练框架。

authors_text: Hebert Azevedo-Sa,X. Jessie Yang,Lionel P. Robert Jr.,Dawn M. Tilbury
title: A Unified Bi-directional Model for Natural and Artificial Trust in Human-Robot Collaboration
title_zh: 人机协作中自然和人工信任的统一双向模型
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, conditionally accepted for publication on IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
comments: 8 pages, 5 figures, conditionally accepted for publication on IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
abstract: We introduce a novel capabilities-based bi-directional multi-task trust model that can be used for trust prediction from either a human or a robotic trustor agent. Tasks are represented in terms of their capability requirements, while trustee agents are characterized by their individual capabilities. Trustee agents' capabilities are not deterministic; they are represented by belief distributions. For each task to be executed, a higher level of trust is assigned to trustee agents who have demonstrated that their capabilities exceed the task's requirements. We report results of an online experiment with 284 participants, revealing that our model outperforms existing models for multi-task trust prediction from a human trustor. We also present simulations of the model for determining trust from a robotic trustor. Our model is useful for control authority allocation applications that involve human-robot teams.
summary: We introduce a novel capabilities-based bi-directional multi-task trust model that can be used for trust prediction from either a human or a robotic trustor agent. Tasks are represented in terms of their capability requirements, while trustee agents are characterized by their individual capabilities. Trustee agents' capabilities are not deterministic; they are represented by belief distributions. For each task to be executed, a higher level of trust is assigned to trustee agents who have demonstrated that their capabilities exceed the task's requirements. We report results of an online experiment with 284 participants, revealing that our model outperforms existing models for multi-task trust prediction from a human trustor. We also present simulations of the model for determining trust from a robotic trustor. Our model is useful for control authority allocation applications that involve human-robot teams.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新颖的基于能力的双向多任务信任模型，可用于人类或机器人信任代理的信任预测。任务以其能力要求来表示，而受托代理则以其个人能力为特征。受托代理人的能力不是确定性的；它们由信念分布表示。对于要执行的每项任务，将向已证明其能力超出任务要求的受托代理分配更高级别的信任。我们报告了 284 名参与者参与的在线实验的结果，结果表明我们的模型优于人类信任者的多任务信任预测的现有模型。我们还展示了用于确定机器人信任者信任的模型的模拟。我们的模型对于涉及人类机器人团队的控制权限分配应用程序非常有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于能力的双向多任务信任模型，用于人机协作中人类和机器人信任者的信任预测。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以准确预测多任务场景下人机协作中的信任关系，需开发适用于人类与机器人双向信任评估的统一框架。
AI.method: 通过能力需求表征任务，用信念分布描述信任者能力，根据能力与任务需求的匹配度动态分配信任等级，并验证模型在人类与机器人场景下的有效性。
AI.result: 在线实验显示模型在人类信任预测上优于现有方法，机器人信任模拟验证了模型的可行性，适用于人机团队控制权限分配。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为动态调整人机协作中的信任关系提供了理论支持，可提升团队协作效率与安全性。

We report results of an online experiment with 284 participants, revealing that our model outperforms existing models for multi-task trust prediction from a human trustor. We also present simulations of the model for determining trust from a robotic trustor. Our model is useful for control authority allocation applications that involve human-robot teams. 我们引入了一种新颖的基于能力的双向多任务信任模型，可用于人类或机器人信任代理的信任预测。任务以其能力要求来表示，而受托代理则以其个人能力为特征。受托代理人的能力不是确定性的；它们由信念分布表示。对于要执行的每项任务，将向已证明其能力超出任务要求的受托代理分配更高级别的信任。我们报告了 284 名参与者参与的在线实验的结果，结果表明我们的模型优于人类信任者的多任务信任预测的现有模型。我们还展示了用于确定机器人信任者信任的模型的模拟。我们的模型对于涉及人类机器人团队的控制权限分配应用程序非常有用。 本文提出一种基于能力的双向多任务信任模型，用于人机协作中人类和机器人信任者的信任预测。 Hebert Azevedo-Sa,X. Jessie Yang,Lionel P. Robert Jr.,Dawn M. Tilbury cs.RO

authors_text: Bogdan Mazoure,Ahmed M. Ahmed,Patrick MacAlpine,R Devon Hjelm,Andrey Kolobov
title: Cross-Trajectory Representation Learning for Zero-Shot Generalization in RL
title_zh: 强化学习中零样本泛化的交叉轨迹表示学习
comment: ICLR 2022
comments: ICLR 2022
abstract: A highly desirable property of a reinforcement learning (RL) agent -- and a major difficulty for deep RL approaches -- is the ability to generalize policies learned on a few tasks over a high-dimensional observation space to similar tasks not seen during training. Many promising approaches to this challenge consider RL as a process of training two functions simultaneously: a complex nonlinear encoder that maps high-dimensional observations to a latent representation space, and a simple linear policy over this space. We posit that a superior encoder for zero-shot generalization in RL can be trained by using solely an auxiliary SSL objective if the training process encourages the encoder to map behaviorally similar observations to similar representations, as reward-based signal can cause overfitting in the encoder (Raileanu et al., 2021). We propose Cross-Trajectory Representation Learning (CTRL), a method that runs within an RL agent and conditions its encoder to recognize behavioral similarity in observations by applying a novel SSL objective to pairs of trajectories from the agent's policies. CTRL can be viewed as having the same effect as inducing a pseudo-bisimulation metric but, crucially, avoids the use of rewards and associated overfitting risks. Our experiments ablate various components of CTRL and demonstrate that in combination with PPO it achieves better generalization performance on the challenging Procgen benchmark suite (Cobbe et al., 2020).
summary: A highly desirable property of a reinforcement learning (RL) agent -- and a major difficulty for deep RL approaches -- is the ability to generalize policies learned on a few tasks over a high-dimensional observation space to similar tasks not seen during training. Many promising approaches to this challenge consider RL as a process of training two functions simultaneously: a complex nonlinear encoder that maps high-dimensional observations to a latent representation space, and a simple linear policy over this space. We posit that a superior encoder for zero-shot generalization in RL can be trained by using solely an auxiliary SSL objective if the training process encourages the encoder to map behaviorally similar observations to similar representations, as reward-based signal can cause overfitting in the encoder (Raileanu et al., 2021). We propose Cross-Trajectory Representation Learning (CTRL), a method that runs within an RL agent and conditions its encoder to recognize behavioral similarity in observations by applying a novel SSL objective to pairs of trajectories from the agent's policies. CTRL can be viewed as having the same effect as inducing a pseudo-bisimulation metric but, crucially, avoids the use of rewards and associated overfitting risks. Our experiments ablate various components of CTRL and demonstrate that in combination with PPO it achieves better generalization performance on the challenging Procgen benchmark suite (Cobbe et al., 2020).
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）智能体的一个非常理想的特性——也是深度强化学习方法的一个主要困难——是能够将在高维观察空间上的一些任务中学到的策略推广到训练期间未见过的类似任务。许多有前途的应对这一挑战的方法都将强化学习视为同时训练两个函数的过程：将高维观测值映射到潜在表示空间的复杂非线性编码器，以及该空间上的简单线性策略。我们假设，如果训练过程鼓励编码器将行为相似的观察结果映射到相似的表示，则可以仅使用辅助 SSL 目标来训练 RL 中零样本泛化的高级编码器，因为基于奖励的信号可能会导致编码器中的过度拟合（Raileanu 等人，2021）。我们提出了跨轨迹表示学习 (CTRL)，这是一种在 RL 代理内运行的方法，通过将新颖的 SSL 目标应用于代理策略中的轨迹对，调节其编码器来识别观察中的行为相似性。 CTRL 可以被视为与引入伪互模拟度量具有相同的效果，但最重要的是，它避免了奖励的使用和相关的过度拟合风险。我们的实验消除了 CTRL 的各个组件，并证明与 PPO 结合，它可以在具有挑战性的 Procgen 基准套件上实现更好的泛化性能（Cobbe 等人，2020）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CTRL的方法，通过跨轨迹表示学习提升强化学习（RL）中的零样本泛化能力，无需依赖奖励信号。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在高维观测空间中难以泛化到未见过的任务，传统方法依赖奖励信号可能导致编码器过拟合，而自监督学习（SSL）可能通过捕捉行为相似性解决此问题。
AI.method: CTRL在RL智能体内部运行，通过应用新颖的SSL目标到智能体策略的轨迹对，使编码器学习行为相似性的表示，避免使用奖励信号。
AI.result: 实验表明，CTRL结合PPO在Procgen基准测试中实现了更优的泛化性能，且组件消融实验验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: CTRL通过行为相似性驱动的表示学习，有效提升了零样本泛化能力，为RL提供了无需奖励的替代方案。

authors_text: Yulun Wu,Mikaela Cashman,Nicholas Choma,Érica T. Prates,Verónica G. Melesse Vergara,Manesh Shah,Andrew Chen,Austin Clyde,Thomas S. Brettin,Wibe A. de Jong,Neeraj Kumar,Martha S. Head,Rick L. Stevens,Peter Nugent,Daniel A. Jacobson,James B. Brown
title: Spatial Graph Attention and Curiosity-driven Policy for Antiviral Drug Discovery
title_zh: 抗病毒药物发现的空间图注意力和好奇心驱动政策
abstract: We developed Distilled Graph Attention Policy Network (DGAPN), a reinforcement learning model to generate novel graph-structured chemical representations that optimize user-defined objectives by efficiently navigating a physically constrained domain. The framework is examined on the task of generating molecules that are designed to bind, noncovalently, to functional sites of SARS-CoV-2 proteins. We present a spatial Graph Attention (sGAT) mechanism that leverages self-attention over both node and edge attributes as well as encoding the spatial structure -- this capability is of considerable interest in synthetic biology and drug discovery. An attentional policy network is introduced to learn the decision rules for a dynamic, fragment-based chemical environment, and state-of-the-art policy gradient techniques are employed to train the network with stability. Exploration is driven by the stochasticity of the action space design and the innovation reward bonuses learned and proposed by random network distillation. In experiments, our framework achieved outstanding results compared to state-of-the-art algorithms, while reducing the complexity of paths to chemical synthesis.
summary: We developed Distilled Graph Attention Policy Network (DGAPN), a reinforcement learning model to generate novel graph-structured chemical representations that optimize user-defined objectives by efficiently navigating a physically constrained domain. The framework is examined on the task of generating molecules that are designed to bind, noncovalently, to functional sites of SARS-CoV-2 proteins. We present a spatial Graph Attention (sGAT) mechanism that leverages self-attention over both node and edge attributes as well as encoding the spatial structure -- this capability is of considerable interest in synthetic biology and drug discovery. An attentional policy network is introduced to learn the decision rules for a dynamic, fragment-based chemical environment, and state-of-the-art policy gradient techniques are employed to train the network with stability. Exploration is driven by the stochasticity of the action space design and the innovation reward bonuses learned and proposed by random network distillation. In experiments, our framework achieved outstanding results compared to state-of-the-art algorithms, while reducing the complexity of paths to chemical synthesis.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了蒸馏图注意力策略网络（DGAPN），这是一种强化学习模型，用于生成新颖的图结构化学表示，通过有效地导航物理约束域来优化用户定义的目标。该框架的任务是生成旨在非共价结合 SARS-CoV-2 蛋白功能位点的分子。我们提出了一种空间图注意力（sGAT）机制，该机制利用节点和边缘属性上的自注意力以及对空间结构进行编码——这种能力在合成生物学和药物发现中具有相当大的意义。引入注意力策略网络来学习动态的、基于片段的化学环境的决策规则，并采用最先进的策略梯度技术来稳定地训练网络。探索是由行动空间设计的随机性以及随机网络蒸馏学习和提出的创新奖励奖金驱动的。在实验中，与最先进的算法相比，我们的框架取得了出色的结果，同时降低了化学合成路径的复杂性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图注意力和强化学习的抗病毒药物发现框架DGAPN，用于生成优化的化学分子结构以结合SARS-CoV-2蛋白。
AI.motivation: 传统药物设计方法在探索复杂化学空间和满足多目标优化时效率低下，需结合图结构建模与强化学习提升分子生成能力。
AI.method: 开发空间图注意力机制(sGAT)编码分子结构信息，结合注意力策略网络和策略梯度训练，并通过随机网络蒸馏实现探索驱动。
AI.result: 在SARS-CoV-2靶点分子生成任务中，DGAPN优于现有算法且显著降低合成路径复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过图结构建模与强化学习结合，在抗病毒药物设计中展现出高效生成优化分子的潜力。

authors_text: Elizabeth Excell,Noura Al Moubayed
title: Towards Equal Gender Representation in the Annotations of Toxic Language Detection
title_zh: 有毒语言检测注释中的性别平等代表
comment: Paper is accepted at GeBNLP2021 workshop at ACL-IJCNLP 2021
comments: Paper is accepted at GeBNLP2021 workshop at ACL-IJCNLP 2021
abstract: Classifiers tend to propagate biases present in the data on which they are trained. Hence, it is important to understand how the demographic identities of the annotators of comments affect the fairness of the resulting model. In this paper, we focus on the differences in the ways men and women annotate comments for toxicity, investigating how these differences result in models that amplify the opinions of male annotators. We find that the BERT model as-sociates toxic comments containing offensive words with male annotators, causing the model to predict 67.7% of toxic comments as having been annotated by men. We show that this disparity between gender predictions can be mitigated by removing offensive words and highly toxic comments from the training data. We then apply the learned associations between gender and language to toxic language classifiers, finding that models trained exclusively on female-annotated data perform 1.8% better than those trained solely on male-annotated data and that training models on data after removing all offensive words reduces bias in the model by 55.5% while increasing the sensitivity by 0.4%.
summary: Classifiers tend to propagate biases present in the data on which they are trained. Hence, it is important to understand how the demographic identities of the annotators of comments affect the fairness of the resulting model. In this paper, we focus on the differences in the ways men and women annotate comments for toxicity, investigating how these differences result in models that amplify the opinions of male annotators. We find that the BERT model as-sociates toxic comments containing offensive words with male annotators, causing the model to predict 67.7% of toxic comments as having been annotated by men. We show that this disparity between gender predictions can be mitigated by removing offensive words and highly toxic comments from the training data. We then apply the learned associations between gender and language to toxic language classifiers, finding that models trained exclusively on female-annotated data perform 1.8% better than those trained solely on male-annotated data and that training models on data after removing all offensive words reduces bias in the model by 55.5% while increasing the sensitivity by 0.4%.
abstract_zh: 分类器倾向于传播它们所训练的数据中存在的偏差。因此，了解评论注释者的人口统计身份如何影响结果模型的公平性非常重要。在本文中，我们重点关注男性和女性注释毒性评论的方式差异，调查这些差异如何导致放大男性注释者意见的模型。我们发现 BERT 模型将包含攻击性词语的有毒评论与男性注释者相关联，导致该模型预测 67.7% 的有毒评论是由男性注释的。我们表明，通过从训练数据中删除攻击性词语和剧毒评论，可以减轻性别预测之间的这种差异。然后，我们将学到的性别和语言之间的关联应用于有毒语言分类器，发现专门针对女性注释数据训练的模型比仅针对男性注释数据训练的模型表现好 1.8%，并且在删除所有攻击性词语后对数据进行训练模型将模型中的偏差减少了 55.5%，同时将灵敏度提高了 0.4%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究有毒语言检测注释中的性别差异对模型公平性的影响，并提出减少性别偏见的方法。
AI.motivation: 分类器可能继承训练数据中的偏见，而注释者的性别差异可能影响模型公平性，需解决这一问题以提升模型公正性。
AI.method: 分析男女注释者对毒性评论的标注差异，利用BERT模型关联性别与语言特征，并通过移除攻击性词汇和高度有毒评论来减轻偏见。
AI.result: BERT模型将67.7%的有毒评论关联至男性注释者；移除攻击性词汇后模型偏见减少55.5%，敏感度提升0.4%；仅用女性标注数据训练的模型准确率高1.8%。
AI.conclusion: 调整训练数据（如移除攻击性词汇）可有效降低模型性别偏见，同时提升检测性能，促进公平性改进。

search_text: Towards Equal Gender Representation in the Annotations of Toxic Language Detection 有毒语言检测注释中的性别平等代表 Classifiers tend to propagate biases present in the data on which they are trained. Hence, it is important to understand how the demographic identities of the annotators of comments affect the fairness of the resulting model. In this paper, we focus on the differences in the ways men and women annotate comments for toxicity, investigating how these differences result in models that amplify the opinions of male annotators. We find that the BERT model as-sociates toxic comments containing offensive words with male annotators, causing the model to predict 67.7% of toxic comments as having been annotated by men. We show that this disparity between gender predictions can be mitigated by removing offensive words and highly toxic comments from the training data. We then apply the learned associations between gender and language to toxic language classifiers, finding that models trained exclusively on female-annotated data perform 1.8% better than those trained solely on male-annotated data and that training models on data after removing all offensive words reduces bias in the model by 55.5% while increasing the sensitivity by 0.4%. 分类器倾向于传播它们所训练的数据中存在的偏差。因此，了解评论注释者的人口统计身份如何影响结果模型的公平性非常重要。在本文中，我们重点关注男性和女性注释毒性评论的方式差异，调查这些差异如何导致放大男性注释者意见的模型。我们发现 BERT 模型将包含攻击性词语的有毒评论与男性注释者相关联，导致该模型预测 67.7% 的有毒评论是由男性注释的。我们表明，通过从训练数据中删除攻击性词语和剧毒评论，可以减轻性别预测之间的这种差异。然后，我们将学到的性别和语言之间的关联应用于有毒语言分类器，发现专门针对女性注释数据训练的模型比仅针对男性注释数据训练的模型表现好 1.8%，并且在删除所有攻击性词语后对数据进行训练模型将模型中的偏差减少了 55.5%，同时将灵敏度提高了 0.4%。 本文研究有毒语言检测注释中的性别差异对模型公平性的影响，并提出减少性别偏见的方法。 Elizabeth Excell,Noura Al Moubayed cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Nuo Chen,Chenyu You,Yuexian Zou
title: Self-supervised Dialogue Learning for Spoken Conversational Question Answering
title_zh: 口语对话问答的自监督对话学习
comment: To Appear Interspeech 2021
comments: To Appear Interspeech 2021
abstract: In spoken conversational question answering (SCQA), the answer to the corresponding question is generated by retrieving and then analyzing a fixed spoken document, including multi-part conversations. Most SCQA systems have considered only retrieving information from ordered utterances. However, the sequential order of dialogue is important to build a robust spoken conversational question answering system, and the changes of utterances order may severely result in low-quality and incoherent corpora. To this end, we introduce a self-supervised learning approach, including incoherence discrimination, insertion detection, and question prediction, to explicitly capture the coreference resolution and dialogue coherence among spoken documents. Specifically, we design a joint learning framework where the auxiliary self-supervised tasks can enable the pre-trained SCQA systems towards more coherent and meaningful spoken dialogue learning. We also utilize the proposed self-supervised learning tasks to capture intra-sentence coherence. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method provides more coherent, meaningful, and appropriate responses, yielding superior performance gains compared to the original pre-trained language models. Our method achieves state-of-the-art results on the Spoken-CoQA dataset.
summary: In spoken conversational question answering (SCQA), the answer to the corresponding question is generated by retrieving and then analyzing a fixed spoken document, including multi-part conversations. Most SCQA systems have considered only retrieving information from ordered utterances. However, the sequential order of dialogue is important to build a robust spoken conversational question answering system, and the changes of utterances order may severely result in low-quality and incoherent corpora. To this end, we introduce a self-supervised learning approach, including incoherence discrimination, insertion detection, and question prediction, to explicitly capture the coreference resolution and dialogue coherence among spoken documents. Specifically, we design a joint learning framework where the auxiliary self-supervised tasks can enable the pre-trained SCQA systems towards more coherent and meaningful spoken dialogue learning. We also utilize the proposed self-supervised learning tasks to capture intra-sentence coherence. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method provides more coherent, meaningful, and appropriate responses, yielding superior performance gains compared to the original pre-trained language models. Our method achieves state-of-the-art results on the Spoken-CoQA dataset.
abstract_zh: 在口语会话问答（SCQA）中，通过检索并分析固定的口语文档（包括多部分对话）来生成相应问题的答案。大多数 SCQA 系统只考虑从有序话语中检索信息。然而，对话的顺序对于构建强大的口语会话问答系统非常重要，并且话语顺序的变化可能会严重导致低质量和不连贯的语料库。为此，我们引入了一种自监督学习方法，包括不连贯判别、插入检测和问题预测，以明确捕获语音文档之间的共指解析和对话连贯性。具体来说，我们设计了一个联合学习框架，其中辅助自我监督任务可以使预先训练的 SCQA 系统实现更加连贯和有意义的口语对话学习。我们还利用所提出的自我监督学习任务来捕获句子内的连贯性。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法提供了更加连贯、有意义和适当的响应，与原始的预训练语言模型相比，产生了卓越的性能增益。我们的方法在 Spoken-CoQA 数据集上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督对话学习方法，用于提升口语对话问答（SCQA）系统的连贯性和回答质量。
AI.motivation: 现有SCQA系统仅依赖有序语句检索，忽视了对话顺序对语义连贯性的影响，导致回答质量下降。
AI.method: 设计包含不连贯性判别、插入检测和问题预测的自监督任务，结合联合学习框架增强对话连贯性与核心ference解析能力。
AI.result: 在Spoken-CoQA数据集上达到SOTA性能，生成更连贯、语义更丰富的回答，优于原始预训练语言模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模对话连贯性，自监督学习有效提升了SCQA系统的问答质量与语义一致性。
